metadata.name: Student Cannot Log In to LMS

description: A student is unable to log in to the Learning Management System (LMS) to access their online course.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and confirm their enrollment in an online course.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the student's identity and active enrollment.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to reset the student's password for the LMS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully triggers a password reset email to the student's university address.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the student to follow the password reset link in their email and try logging in again.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides clear instructions for the student to resolve the issue.
